calls: itineraryItems.ForEach(itineraryItem => { itineraryItem.NewBunkerOrderId = Guid.NewGuid(); itineraryItem.BunkerOrders = [.. bunkerOrders.Where(x => x.VoyageIteneraryItemId == itineraryItem.Id),]; })

context.VesselReportBunkerReceivals.AsNoTracking().Include(r => r.VesselReport).Where(r => r.VesselReport != null && r.VesselReport.VoyageId == request.VoyageId && r.VesselReport.ReportType == nameof(VesselReportTypeEnum.Receival) && r.VesselReport.IsApproved == true && r.VoyageBunkerLotId != null).ToListAsync(cancellationToken)
new() { Ports = portInfos, BunkerLots = bunkerLots, BunkerOrders = bunkerOrders, ItineraryItems = itineraryItems, VesselBunkerDeliveries = vesselBunkerDeliveryDtos }

calls: dataContext.Users.Where(u => u.IsDeleted == false && u.IsActive == true && u.Id == exportShipment.Coordinator).Select(u => u.FullName).FirstOrDefault()

calls: logger.LogError(Exception e, string format, object arg)

calls: context.Invoices.AsNoTracking().Where(x => x.Id == new Guid(identifier)).Select(x => new DataSyncStatusDetailDto { ... }).FirstOrDefaultAsync(cancellationToken)

calls: dataContext.Estimates.AsNoTracking().AsSplitQuery().Include(x => x.VesselConsumptionRates).Include(x => x.ProfitAndLost).Include(x => x.EstimateTco).ThenInclude(x => x.Tco).Include(x => x.EstimateTco).ThenInclude(x => x.DeliveryPort).Include(x => x.EstimateTco).ThenInclude(x => x.ReDeliveryPort).FirstOrDefaultAsync
mediator.Send(new ExportTcoEstimatePdf.Request { Id = estimate.Id, IsPreVoyage = true })

methods.name: BusinessProcess
calls: dataContext.VoyageIteneraryItems.Where(v => v.Id == itineraryItemId).Include(e => e.Port).Include(e => e.PortDa).Include(e => e.PortTerm).Include(e => e.ShipmentTerm).Include(e => e.BunkerEvents).ThenInclude(e => e.BunkerType).Include(e => e.BunkerEvents).ThenInclude(e => e.EtsEvents).OrderBy(e => e.ItemNumber).ThenBy(e => e.TimeOfArrival).FirstOrDefaultAsync()
SuccessResult(request, "Sync Itinerary to Da Desk successfully")
ExceptionResult(request, new SynchronizationException("Incorrect data type for processor"), "Incorrect data type for processor, this is engine error please contact support")
logger.LogDebug("Start processing export voyage with payload {}", request.PayloadStr)

logger.LogError("Incorrect data type for this processor, payload type is: {payloadType}", request.Payload.GetType())
logger.LogError(e, "Error while processing business process {serviceName}", GetType().Name)

methods.name: GetTimeSerialConfigsByKeyAsync
calls: dataContext.AppTimeSerialConfigs.Where(w => w.ConfigKey == configKey.ToString() && w.IsActive == true && w.ValidFrom >= requestedTime).OrderByDescending(b => b.ValidFrom).FirstOrDefaultAsync(cancellationToken)

methods.name: Handle
calls: context.InvoicedProfitAndLossItems.Where(x => x.InvoiceId != null && x.InvoiceId != Guid.Empty).Where(x => x.InvoiceId == invoice.Id).ToListAsync

calls: new HandledBusinessException(ErrorCode.DATA_NOT_FOUND, $"Invoice with Invoice Id: {invoiceId} not found.")

methods.name: PreDeleteInvoice
calls: _dataContext.TcoInvoices.AsNoTracking().AnyAsync(i => i.TimeCharterId == tcoInvoice.TimeCharterId.Value && i.InvoiceType == InvoiceTypeEnum.TcoInvoicePeriod.ToString() && i.IsDeleted == false && i.PeriodFrom != null && i.PeriodFrom >= tcoInvoice.PeriodTo.Value, cancellationToken)

new Domain.Commons.ApiException(ErrorCode.INVALID_REQUEST, "This Period TCO Invoice cannot be deleted because there is a subsequent period invoice that depends on it. Please delete the later invoice first.")

methods.name: DeleteRelatedVoyageOtherRevenues
calls: _dataContext.VoyageOtherRevenues.Where(e => e.SourceInvoiceId != null).Where(e => e.SourceInvoiceId == inputInvoice.Id).Where(e => e.ItemType == VoyageOtherRevenueItemTypeEnum.FreeFreightItem.ToString() || e.ItemType == VoyageOtherRevenueItemTypeEnum.CommissionSeparateInvoice.ToString()).ToListAsync(cancellationToken)

methods.name: Handle
calls: _context.CommissionInvoices.Where(e => e.IsDeleted == false).Where(e => e.Id == invoiceId).Include(e => e.Voyage).ThenInclude(e => e.Vessel).Include(e => e.Items).Include(e => e.VoyageOtherRevenues).Include(e => e.InvoiceTransaction).Include(e => e.BillVia).AsNoTracking().FirstOrDefault()

methods.name: Handle
calls: context.BaseQuery<PortDaEntity>().AsNoTracking().FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.InterfaceUniqueReference == entity.InterfaceUniqueReference || x.SecondaryInterfaceUniqueReference == entity.InterfaceUniqueReference || x.TertiaryInterfaceUniqueReference == entity.InterfaceUniqueReference, cancellationToken)

methods.name: Handle
calls: _context.Voyages.Where(e => e.Id == request.Id).Include(e => e.Vessel).Include(e => e.Shipments).ThenInclude(e => e.Customer).Include(e => e.Shipments).ThenInclude(e => e.PaymentTerm).Include(e => e.Shipments).ThenInclude(e => e.Ports).ThenInclude(e => e.Port).Include(e => e.Shipments).ThenInclude(e => e.Commissions.Where(x => x.CommissionablePartnerType != CommissionTypeEnum.InternalCommission.ToString())).ThenInclude(e => e.BusinessPartner).AsNoTracking().FirstOrDefaultAsync()

methods.name: Handle
calls: _context.FreightInvoices.Where(e => e.Id == invoiceId).Include(e => e.Voyage).ThenInclude(e => e.Shipments).Include(e => e.InvoicePercentages).ThenInclude(e => e.Shipment).Include(i => i.Items).FirstOrDefault()
mediator.Send(new CreateFreightInvoice.Request{ VoyageId = voyageId, ShipmentId = shipmentId, CreatedById = invoice.CreatedById }, cancellationToken)

methods.return_type: (bool hasOverlap, DateTime start, DateTime end, decimal days)

calls: context.Shipments.AsNoTracking().Include(s => s.TradeAreaOffice).Where(s => s.TradeAreaOffice != null && s.TradeAreaOffice.OfficeId != null && tradeAreaOfficeIds.Contains(s.TradeAreaOffice.OfficeId.Value)).Select(s => s.Id)

methods.name: SendNotification
calls: _logger.LogInformation("{EventName} notification sent for {EntityType} {EntityId}", eventName, entityType, entityId)

methods.name: Handle
calls: query.Where(x => x.PortId == request.SearchParams.PortId && x.ShipmentId != null && (x.ReasonForVisit == ReasonForVisitPortEnum.Loading.ToString() || x.ReasonForVisit == ReasonForVisitPortEnum.Discharging.ToString()))

query.Where(x => (x.ReasonForVisit != null && x.ReasonForVisit.Contains(keySearch)) || (x.Shipment != null && x.Shipment.ConfirmShipmentNumber != null && x.Shipment.ConfirmShipmentNumber.Contains(keySearch)) || (x.Voyage != null && x.Voyage.VoyageNumber != null && x.Voyage.VoyageNumber.Contains(keySearch)) || (x.Voyage != null && x.Voyage.Vessel != null && x.Voyage.Vessel.VesselName != null && x.Voyage.Vessel.VesselName.Contains(keySearch)) || (x.Shipment != null && x.Shipment.CargoType != null && x.Shipment.CargoType.Contains(keySearch)))

new PortCargoHistoryItemDto { ReasonForVisit = EnumHelper.GetDescription(Enum.Parse<ReasonForVisitPortEnum>(x.ReasonForVisit)), CargoTypeId = x.Shipment != null ? x.Shipment.CargoTypeId : null, ShipmentId = x.ShipmentId, ShipmentNumber = x.Shipment != null ? x.Shipment.ConfirmShipmentNumber : null, VesselId = x.Voyage != null ? x.Voyage.VesselId : null, VesselName = x.Voyage != null && x.Voyage.Vessel != null ? x.Voyage.Vessel.VesselName : null, ChartererId = x.Shipment != null ? x.Shipment.CustomerId : null, VoyageId = x.VoyageId, VoyageNo = x.Voyage != null ? x.Voyage.VoyageNumber : null, CpQty = x.Shipment != null ? x.Shipment.CargoQuantity : null, CpQtyUnit = x.Shipment != null ? x.Shipment.CargoQuantityUnit : null, TimeOfArrival = x.TimeOfArrival, TimeOfBerth = x.TimeOfBerth, TimeOfDeparture = x.TimeOfDeparture, AgentId = x.PortAgentId, TimeZone = x.Port != null ? x.Port.TimeZone : null }

methods.name: Handle
calls: context.Vessels.AsNoTracking().Include(x => x.BunkersOnboard).Include(x => x.VesselType).Include(x => x.VesselSpecification).Include(x => x.VesselConsumptionRates).Include(x => x.BunkerTypes).Where(x => vesselIds.Contains(x.Id)).ToListAsync(cancellationToken)

methods.name: ApplyTransitionTo
calls: new ApiException(ErrorCode.STATUS_CHANGE_FORBIDDEN, "Not match the require dependency to change status")

_stateContext.DataContext.Shipments.Include(s => s.OfficeInCharge).Include(s => s.Customer).Include(s => s.Assignee).Include(s => s.Ports).Include(s => s.Instructions).Include(s => s.Restrictions).Include(s => s.Commissions).Include(s => s.Quantities).Include(s => s.ProfitAndLossItems).FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == _stateContext.Entity.Id)

_stateContext.Mediator.Send(new IdentifierGenerator.Request { GeneratorType = IdentifierGeneratorType.ConfirmShipment, BookingOffice = shipmentEntity.OfficeInCharge, BookingOfficeId = shipmentEntity.OfficeInChargeId }).Result

methods.name: Handle
calls: context.EntityTags.Select(g => new { TagId = g.Key, LastUsed = g.Max(x => x.CreatedOn) })
context.Tags.Select(t => new TagDto { Id = t.Id, Name = t.Name, EntityType = t.EntityType })
recentByUser.TryGetValue(t.Id, out var ts) ? ts : DateTime.MinValue
tags.OrderByDescending(t => recentByUser.TryGetValue(t.Id, out var ts) ? ts : DateTime.MinValue)

methods.name: Handle
calls: new ApiException("Old password and new password are equal")

methods.name: ShipmentConfirmValidator
calls: RuleFor(x => x.Customer).Must(x => x?.IsTBD != true && x?.IsBlackList != true)
RuleFor(x => x).Must(x => { decimal? calculated = x.FreightRate * x.CargoQuantity; return Math.Abs(calculated.Value - x.FreightTotal) < 0.2m; })

RuleFor(x => x).Must(x => { if (x.CargoOptionInPercents == null || x.MinQuantity == null) return true; var expectedMin = x.CargoQuantity * (1 - x.CargoOptionInPercents / 100); return Math.Round(x.MinQuantity.Value, 3) == Math.Round(expectedMin.Value, 3); })

RuleFor(x => x).Must(x => { if (x.CargoOptionInPercents == null || x.MaxQuantity == null) return true; var expectedMax = x.CargoQuantity * (1 + x.CargoOptionInPercents / 100); return Math.Round(x.MaxQuantity.Value, 3) == Math.Round(expectedMax.Value, 3); })
